_comment: HOW TO USE: Copy this file, rename it to YOUR_GUILD_ID.json (e.g. 964889268046692414.json), fill in all IDs. Enable Developer Mode in Discord (Settings → Advanced → Developer Mode) to right-click and Copy IDs.

roleCategories.name: Notifications
roleCategories.description: Choose what pings you want (select at least 1)

messages.welcomeDescription:
We're glad you're here!

Before you can access the server, complete a quick **2-minute verification**. This keeps our community safe and quality.

Click below to begin!
messages.rulesText:
1. Be respectful to all members
2. No spamming or self-promotion
3. Follow Discord's Terms of Service
4. No harassment or hate speech
5. Keep content in appropriate channels

By clicking **I Agree**, you confirm you've read and will follow these rules.
messages.dmFailedMessage: Hey {username}! Please enable DMs from server members so I can guide you through verification, then click the button in <#{welcomeChannelId}>!
